        uint System.IConvertible.ToUInt32(global::System.IFormatProvider provider)
        {
            return IsInitialized() ? (Value as System.IConvertible).ToUInt32(provider) : default;
        }

        /// <inheritdoc cref = "System.IConvertible"/>
        ulong System.IConvertible.ToUInt64(global::System.IFormatProvider provider)
        {
            return IsInitialized() ? (Value as System.IConvertible).ToUInt64(provider) : default;
        }

#nullable restore
#nullable disable
        // Private helpers: forward static abstract INumberBase<T> / INumber<T> calls through a
        // constrained type parameter so that the concrete primitive's implementations are invoked.
        private static __T __GetOne<__T>()
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.One;
        private static global::System.Int32 __GetRadix<__T>()
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.Radix;
        private static __T __GetZero<__T>()
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.Zero;
        private static __T __GetAdditiveIdentity<__T>()
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.AdditiveIdentity;
        private static __T __GetMultiplicativeIdentity<__T>()
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.MultiplicativeIdentity;
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsCanonical<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsCanonical(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsComplexNumber<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsComplexNumber(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsEvenInteger<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsEvenInteger(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsFinite<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsFinite(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsImaginaryNumber<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsImaginaryNumber(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsInfinity<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsInfinity(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsInteger<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsInteger(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsNaN<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsNaN(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsNegative<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsNegative(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsNegativeInfinity<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsNegativeInfinity(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsNormal<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsNormal(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsOddInteger<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsOddInteger(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsPositive<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsPositive(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsPositiveInfinity<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsPositiveInfinity(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsRealNumber<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsRealNumber(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsSubnormal<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsSubnormal(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __IsZero<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.IsZero(value);
        private static __T __Abs<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.Abs(value);
        private static __T __MaxMagnitude<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.MaxMagnitude(x, y);
        private static __T __MaxMagnitudeNumber<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.MaxMagnitudeNumber(x, y);
        private static __T __MinMagnitude<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.MinMagnitude(x, y);
        private static __T __MinMagnitudeNumber<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> => __T.MinMagnitudeNumber(x, y);
        private static __T __CreateChecked<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.CreateChecked<__TOther>(value);
        private static __T __CreateSaturating<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.CreateSaturating<__TOther>(value);
        private static __T __CreateTruncating<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.CreateTruncating<__TOther>(value);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertFromChecked<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value, out __T result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertFromChecked<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertFromSaturating<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value, out __T result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertFromSaturating<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertFromTruncating<__T, __TOther>(__TOther value, out __T result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertFromTruncating<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertToChecked<__T, __TOther>(__T value, out __TOther result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertToChecked<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertToSaturating<__T, __TOther>(__T value, out __TOther result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertToSaturating<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static global::System.Boolean __TryConvertToTruncating<__T, __TOther>(__T value, out __TOther result)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__T> where __TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<__TOther> => __T.TryConvertToTruncating<__TOther>(value, out result);
        private static __T __Clamp<__T>(__T value, __T min, __T max)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.Clamp(value, min, max);
        private static __T __CopySign<__T>(__T value, __T sign)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.CopySign(value, sign);
        private static __T __Max<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.Max(x, y);
        private static __T __MaxNumber<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.MaxNumber(x, y);
        private static __T __Min<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.Min(x, y);
        private static __T __MinNumber<__T>(__T x, __T y)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.MinNumber(x, y);
        private static global::System.Int32 __Sign<__T>(__T value)
            where __T : global::System.Numerics.INumber<__T> => __T.Sign(value);
#nullable restore
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count One => From(__GetOne<global::System.UInt32>());
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Int32 Radix => __GetRadix<global::System.UInt32>();
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count Zero => From(__GetZero<global::System.UInt32>());
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count AdditiveIdentity => From(__GetAdditiveIdentity<global::System.UInt32>());
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MultiplicativeIdentity => From(__GetMultiplicativeIdentity<global::System.UInt32>());

        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsCanonical(Count value) => __IsCanonical<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsComplexNumber(Count value) => __IsComplexNumber<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsEvenInteger(Count value) => __IsEvenInteger<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsFinite(Count value) => __IsFinite<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsImaginaryNumber(Count value) => __IsImaginaryNumber<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsInfinity(Count value) => __IsInfinity<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsInteger(Count value) => __IsInteger<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsNaN(Count value) => __IsNaN<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsNegative(Count value) => __IsNegative<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsNegativeInfinity(Count value) => __IsNegativeInfinity<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsNormal(Count value) => __IsNormal<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsOddInteger(Count value) => __IsOddInteger<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsPositive(Count value) => __IsPositive<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsPositiveInfinity(Count value) => __IsPositiveInfinity<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsRealNumber(Count value) => __IsRealNumber<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsSubnormal(Count value) => __IsSubnormal<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsZero(Count value) => __IsZero<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count Abs(Count value) => From(__Abs<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MaxMagnitude(Count x, Count y) => From(__MaxMagnitude<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MaxMagnitudeNumber(Count x, Count y) => From(__MaxMagnitudeNumber<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MinMagnitude(Count x, Count y) => From(__MinMagnitude<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MinMagnitudeNumber(Count x, Count y) => From(__MinMagnitudeNumber<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count CreateChecked<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateChecked<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count CreateSaturating<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateSaturating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count CreateTruncating<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateTruncating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value));
#nullable disable
        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertFromChecked<TOther>(TOther value, out Count result)
        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromChecked<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value, out global::System.UInt32 primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertFromSaturating<TOther>(TOther value, out Count result)
        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromSaturating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value, out global::System.UInt32 primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertFromTruncating<TOther>(TOther value, out Count result)
        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromTruncating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value, out global::System.UInt32 primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertToChecked<TOther>(Count value, out TOther result)
        {
            result = default;
            return __TryConvertToChecked<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value.Value, out result);
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertToSaturating<TOther>(Count value, out TOther result)
        {
            result = default;
            return __TryConvertToSaturating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value.Value, out result);
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<Count>.TryConvertToTruncating<TOther>(Count value, out TOther result)
        {
            result = default;
            return __TryConvertToTruncating<global::System.UInt32, TOther>(value.Value, out result);
        }

#nullable restore
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count Clamp(Count value, Count min, Count max) => From(__Clamp<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value, min.Value, max.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count CopySign(Count value, Count sign) => From(__CopySign<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value, sign.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count Max(Count x, Count y) => From(__Max<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MaxNumber(Count x, Count y) => From(__MaxNumber<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count Min(Count x, Count y) => From(__Min<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count MinNumber(Count x, Count y) => From(__MinNumber<global::System.UInt32>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Int32 Sign(Count value) => __Sign<global::System.UInt32>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator +(Count left, Count right) => From((global::System.UInt32)(left.Value + right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator -(Count left, Count right) => From((global::System.UInt32)(left.Value - right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator *(Count left, Count right) => From((global::System.UInt32)(left.Value * right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator /(Count left, Count right) => From((global::System.UInt32)(left.Value / right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator %(Count left, Count right) => From((global::System.UInt32)(left.Value % right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator -(Count value) => From(unchecked((global::System.UInt32)(default(global::System.UInt32) - value.Value)));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator +(Count value) => From((global::System.UInt32)(+value.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator ++(Count value)
        {
            var v = value.Value;
            return From(++v);
        }

        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static Count operator --(Count value)
        {
            var v = value.Value;
            return From(--v);
        }

        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean operator <(Count left, Count right) => left.Value < right.Value;
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean operator <=(Count left, Count right) => left.Value <= right.Value;
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean operator>(Count left, Count right) => left.Value > right.Value;
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean operator >=(Count left, Count right) => left.Value >= right.Value;
        public readonly override global::System.Int32 GetHashCode()
        {
            return global::System.Collections.Generic.EqualityComparer<global::System.UInt32>.Default.GetHashCode(Value);
        }

        /// <inheritdoc cref = "uint.ToString()"/>
        public override global::System.String ToString() => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString() ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        /// <inheritdoc cref = "uint.ToString(System.IFormatProvider? )"/>
        public global::System.String ToString(global::System.IFormatProvider provider) => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString(provider) ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        /// <inheritdoc cref = "uint.ToString(string? )"/>
        public global::System.String ToString([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.StringSyntaxAttribute("NumericFormat")] string format) => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString(format) ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private readonly void EnsureInitialized()
        {
            if (!IsInitialized())
            {
#if DEBUG
               ThrowHelper.ThrowWhenNotInitialized(_stackTrace);
#else
                ThrowHelper.ThrowWhenNotInitialized();
#endif
            }
        }

#nullable disable
        /// <summary>
        /// Converts a Count to or from JSON.
        /// </summary>
        public partial class CountSystemTextJsonConverter : global::System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter<Count>
        {
            public override Count Read(ref global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, global::System.Type typeToConvert, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                var primitive = global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<global::System.UInt32>(ref reader, options);
                return DeserializeJson(primitive);
            }

            public override void Write(global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, Count value, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(writer, value.Value, options);
            }

#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER
            public override Count ReadAsPropertyName(ref global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, global::System.Type typeToConvert, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                var primitive = global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<global::System.UInt32>(ref reader, options);
                return DeserializeJson(primitive);
            }

            public override void WriteAsPropertyName(global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, Count value, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                writer.WritePropertyName(global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(value.Value));
            }
#endif
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
            [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            private static void ThrowJsonExceptionWhenValidationFails(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                var e = ThrowHelper.CreateValidationException(validation);
                throw new global::System.Text.Json.JsonException(null, e);
            }

            private static Count DeserializeJson(global::System.UInt32 value)
            {
                return new Count(value);
            }
        }

#nullable restore
#nullable disable
        class CountTypeConverter : global::System.ComponentModel.TypeConverter
        {
            public override global::System.Boolean CanConvertFrom(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Type sourceType)
            {
                return sourceType == typeof(global::System.UInt32);
            }

            public override global::System.Object ConvertFrom(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, global::System.Object value)
            {
                global::System.UInt32 ut = (global::System.UInt32)value;
                return Count.__Deserialize(ut);
            }

            public override bool CanConvertTo(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Type sourceType)
            {
                return sourceType == typeof(global::System.UInt32);
            }

            public override object ConvertTo(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, global::System.Object value, global::System.Type destinationType)
            {
                if (value is Count idValue)
                {
                    return idValue.Value;
                }

                return base.ConvertTo(context, culture, value, destinationType);
            }
        }

#nullable restore
#nullable disable
        internal sealed class CountDebugView
        {
            private readonly Count _t;
            CountDebugView(Count t)
            {
                _t = t;
            }

            public global::System.Boolean IsInitialized => _t.IsInitialized();
            public global::System.String UnderlyingType => "System.UInt32";
            public global::System.String Value => _t.IsInitialized() ? _t._value.ToString() : "[not initialized]";
#if DEBUG
        public global::System.String CreatedWith => _t._stackTrace.ToString() ?? "the From method";
#endif
            public global::System.String Conversions => @"Default";
        }

#nullable restore
        static class ThrowHelper
        {
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowInvalidOperationException(string message) => throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException(message);
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowArgumentException(string message, string arg) => throw new global::System.ArgumentException(message, arg);
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenCreatedWithNull() => throw CreateCannotBeNullException();
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenNotInitialized() => throw CreateValidationException("Use of uninitialized Value Object.");
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenNotInitialized(global::System.Diagnostics.StackTrace stackTrace) => throw CreateValidationException("Use of uninitialized Value Object at: " + stackTrace ?? "");
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenValidationFails(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                throw CreateValidationException(validation);
            }

            internal static global::System.Exception CreateValidationException(string message) => new global::Vogen.ValueObjectValidationException(message);
            internal static global::System.Exception CreateCannotBeNullException() => new global::Vogen.ValueObjectValidationException("Cannot create a value object with null.");
            internal static global::System.Exception CreateValidationException(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                var ex = CreateValidationException(validation.ErrorMessage);
                if (validation.Data != null)
                {
                    foreach (var kvp in validation.Data)
                    {
                        ex.Data[kvp.Key] = kvp.Value;
                    }
                }

                return ex;
            }
        }
    }
}
]
